text.title: Churn Basics Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing a green-path application of `Churn Basics`. Inputs → procedure → validated artefact.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: A solo founder applies `Churn Basics` to a real engagement. The Applies-If preconditions hold; the operator owns the artefact; the trigger is named; evidence anchors back every conclusion; the validator exits 0.

example.title: Green-path artefact
example.note: Demonstrates every required field with realistic values. Validator returns exit 0.
